title: NIT Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II post
post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate II
short_info: National Institute of Technology, Tiruchirappalli (NIT Tiruchirappalli) has published the JRF / Project Associate II Notification 2026 on 25 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 JRF / Project Associate II position. Candidates up to 50 years of age and holding B.E/B.Tech or M.E/M.Tech qualifications in Mechanical Engineering / Manufacturing Engineering / Design / Thermal Engineering / Industrial Safety Engineering are eligible to apply online at NIT Tiruchirappalli Official Website. The application process will be active from 25 May 2026 to 10 June 2026, and candidates can easily acce

age_limit.details: For JRF: 35 years, Project Associate – II: 50 years.

qualification.details: JRF: B.E/B.Tech with first class in Mechanical Engineering or M.E/M.Tech with first class in Manufacturing Engineering / Design / Thermal Engineering / Industrial Safety Engineering through CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or National Level examinations by Central Government Departments/Agencies. Project Associate II: B.E/B.Tech with first class in Mechanical Engineering or M.E/M.Tech with first class in Manufacturing Engineering / Design / Thermal Engineering / Industrial Safety Engineering from AICTE/MoE recognized Institute/University and 2 years experience in R&D or Academic Institutions.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (GATE qualified) or Rs. 33,000/- + HRA (Non-GATE)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli JRF / Project Associate II Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Tiruchirappalli JRF / Project Associate II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: For the JRF position, candidates need a B.E/B.Tech with first class in Mechanical Engineering or M.E/M.Tech with first class in Manufacturing Engineering, Design, Thermal Engineering, or Industrial Safety Engineering, selected through CSIR-UGC NET/GATE or equivalent national-level examinations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the JRF / Project Associate II positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for these positions is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India norms for JRF candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF / Project Associate II posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 33,000 to Rs. 37,000, plus HRA, depending on their qualifications and GATE status.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF / Project Associate II posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will be based on an interview. Candidates shortlisted based on their applications will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of JRF / Project Associate II in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The positions of JRF / Project Associate II are contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
